title: eq's All Year Christmas
description: Initially, it was just a resource pack that changes normal chests to Christmas chests, but later on, even more Christmas stuff was added to it (¯▿¯)
body:
Initially, it was just a resource pack that changes normal chests to Christmas chests, but later on, even more Christmas stuff were added to it (¯▿¯)

**Supported languages:** English (US), Ukrainian, LOLCAT

If you have any ideas, want to change something (e.g. you don't like a texture), or want to suggest a version for support, feel free to open an [issue](https://github.com/eqoffical/All-Year-Christmas/issues)!
You can also report if something doesn't work.

**Highlights:**
Fixed boats! | Christmas themed items
:-----------:|:----------------------:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13366293820bdbbd037bf3aaedee848832c17952.png) | ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8257c0c9d97f34c02fb95c1e9037a9071074e5fa.png)

> **Consider supporting 🇺🇦 Ukraine:** [Come Back Alive Foundation](https://savelife.in.ua/en/)

<details>
<summary>Complete list of changes:</summary>
  
- Normal chests are now Chrstmas all year
- Trapped chests have their own texture
- Ender chest has its own texture with redrawn particles (Nether portal and Respawn Anchor also have them)
- Barrels are Christmas as well
- Boat with Chest Christmas too (item texture has been changed)
- Minecart with Chest item texture has been changed as well
- Donkeys, Mules and Llamas have Christamas chests
- Leaves now have garland
- All Swords, Pickaxes, Axes, Shovels and Hoes have more festive look
- Bow and Arrows, Trident, Mace, Fishing Rods were changed to be more festive
- Leather Armor redrawn to make it more fitting for winter
- Netherite and Diamond helmet were turn into a Fur Christmas hat
- Stick is now Candy Cane
- Totem of Undying is now Gingerbread
- Enchanted Glint was tinted to red
- Colormap (the texture from which the color of leaves and grass is picked) was tinted to a gray-ish shade
- `Java Edition` in main menu was changed to `All Year!^^`

</details>
